zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter de Arches於1130年出生在英國越可爾索普 阿其時，他的父親Guillaume d'Arques35歲，母親Yvette de York37歲。他於1160年與Emma在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Arches
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Norman, English: locative name from any of various places in France called Arques (Eure, Pas-de-Calais, Seine-Maritime). The name was sometimes reduced to   Arch  .
2 English: variant of Arch with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Arch
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living by a bridge, from Middle English, Old French arche ‘arch’ (i.e. of a bridge).
English (of Norman origin): shortened form of Arches, a habitational name from any of various places in France called Arques (Eure, Pas-de-Calais, Seine-Maritime).
Germanized form of Slovenian Arh: from a shortened form of the personal name Areh, an old vernacular form of Henrik (see Henry 1).

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter de Arches was born in 1130, in Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England, his father, Guillaume d'Arques, was 35 and his mother, Yvette de York, was 37. He married Emma in 1160, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter de Arches est né en 1130, à Thorp Arch, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Guillaume d'Arques, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Yvette de York, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Emma en 1160, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter de Arches 1130 in Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume d'Arques 35 und seine Mutter Yvette de York 37. Er hat 1160 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Emma geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Arches è nato il nel 1130 nel Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Guillaume d'Arques, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Yvette de York, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Emma nel 1160, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia.

ko.lifeSummary: Peter de Arches(이)가 1130년 영국 요르크실르 소 아치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume d'Arques(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Yvette de York(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Emma(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Arches nasceu em 1130, em Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Guillaume d'Arques, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Yvette de York, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma em 1160, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter de Arches родился в 1130 г. в местности таурп арч, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Guillaume d'Arques было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Yvette de York, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma в 1160 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter de Arches nació en 1130, en Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Guillaume d'Arques, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Yvette de York, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Emma en 1160, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija.
